happy.message: I still remember our first project review — you walked in completely prepared and made everyone excited about the work. That energy was contagious every single day!

sad.message: I'm going to miss seeing your face at our desk every morning. The office really won't feel the same without you here.

miserable.message: Okay, I know today feels rough — but remember how far you've come. We're so proud of you, and we're only ever a message away.
